items.description: Archives completed action-card items from shared storage and removes them from the active card.
items.readme:
# action-card-cleanup-ce

Archives completed action-card items from shared storage and removes them from the active card.

## Behavior

- read shared action-card, completion-state, and archive JSON files
- append completed active items to the permanent archive idempotently
- remove archived items from the active card and clear completion state

On every tick this module emits `ce.action.card.cleanup.snapshot` with module-specific outcome fields and records the same outcome in the `ce.reconstruction` memory stream.

## Source discipline

The source candidate was reconstructed into protocol-native behavior. No private paths, operator identity, account data, product registry, or personal workflow content is shipped.

## Install

```bash
sz install action-card-cleanup-ce
sz doctor action-card-cleanup-ce
sz tick --reason action-card-cleanup-ce-smoke
```

items.description: Builds a dashboard health snapshot from generic session, action-card, and module state files.
items.readme:
# agent-dashboard-ce

items.description: Records recent bus events into a hashed daily chronicle stream.

items.description: Selects the highest-signal repository files for a task or focus query.

max_tokens.description: Approximate context budget for selected files.

top_n.description: Maximum number of files to select.

items.readme:

items.description: Generates novel hypotheses from accumulated bus history during quiet periods.
items.readme: Dreaming reviews recent bus history during quiet periods and drafts structured hypotheses through the protocol's constrained LLM path. It is the repo's low-frequency ideation loop, gated by novelty and schema validation.

items.description: Indexes evidence-like repository documents into a compact memory map.
items.readme:
# eidetic-ce

Indexes evidence-like repository documents into a compact memory map.

## Behavior

- scan public markdown and document filenames for evidence concepts
- group evidence surfaces by purpose and file type
- write a searchable memory index without copying private document text

On every tick this module emits `ce.eidetic.index.snapshot` with module-specific outcome fields and records the same outcome in the `ce.reconstruction` memory stream.

## Source discipline

The source candidate was reconstructed into protocol-native behavior. No private paths, operator identity, account data, product registry, or personal workflow content is shipped.

## Install

```bash
sz install eidetic-ce
sz doctor eidetic-ce
sz tick --reason eidetic-ce-smoke
```

items.description: Modulates other modules' setpoints based on aggregate health snapshots.
items.readme: Endocrine listens for aggregate health snapshots and adjusts module setpoints in response. It provides a first autonomous regulation loop so System Zero can dampen noisy behavior and react to unhealthy states.

items.description: Reads .sz/repo-profile.json and executes a per-language run command if today's expected output is missing.

run_command.description: Override; if empty, derived from repo-profile.

expected_output_glob.description: Override; if empty, derived from repo-profile.

items.readme: Goal Runner is the bridge between Repo Genesis and repository action. It reads the S0 repo profile, derives a simple per-language run command, and invokes it on tick only when today's expected output is missing.

items.description: Periodic pulse marker. The minimum living signal.
items.readme: Heartbeat is the minimum living signal for a static System Zero repository. It emits a pulse event on each tick and records a lightweight memory trace so other modules can tell that the repo is active.

items.description: Passive anomaly detector.
items.readme: Immune watches the repository's event stream for simple anomaly signals and emits normalized anomaly events. It gives downstream modules a shared first layer of passive health detection without coupling them to the host.

items.description: Discovers MCP server definitions and produces a launch readiness plan.
items.readme:
# mcp-server-launcher-ce

Discovers MCP server definitions and produces a launch readiness plan.

## Behavior

- find MCP config files and server scripts in the repository
- classify servers as launchable, missing command, or config-only
- emit a deterministic launch plan instead of starting long-running processes

On every tick this module emits `ce.mcp.launch.plan.snapshot` with module-specific outcome fields and records the same outcome in the `ce.reconstruction` memory stream.

## Source discipline

The source candidate was reconstructed into protocol-native behavior. No private paths, operator identity, account data, product registry, or personal workflow content is shipped.

## Install

```bash
sz install mcp-server-launcher-ce
sz doctor mcp-server-launcher-ce
sz tick --reason mcp-server-launcher-ce-smoke
```

items.description: Rotates the bus log; archives older files.

rotate_after_days.description: Rotate when older than N days.

rotate_after_mb.description: Rotate when larger than N MB.

items.readme: Metabolism keeps the append-only bus usable over time by rotating and archiving old event logs. It preserves the protocol's JSONL discipline while preventing long-running repositories from accumulating unbounded operational weight.

items.description: Predicts the next likely event type from recent bus history.
items.readme: Prediction reads recent bus history and emits the next likely event types. It gives other modules a simple forecast signal they can use to prepare before repeated patterns turn into failures.

items.description: Counts active ready-queue entries and opens or closes a content-production gate.

max_depth.description: Maximum active queue entries before the gate closes.

items.readme:

items.description: Aggregates anomalies into colored health snapshots.
items.readme: Subconscious turns anomaly events into a compact health snapshot. It aggregates recent signals into green, amber, or red state so regulators and operators can react to repo health through one stable capability.

items.description: Audits the local System Zero installation and reconstructed stack readiness.
